purpose: Machine-readable dependency policy for the ten OPL Framework source modules under src/modules.
machine_boundary: This contract governs physical source-module imports only. It does not define runtime truth, domain truth, owner receipts, typed blockers, release readiness, product packaging, or a new Framework module.

deep_cross_module_imports.reason: Cross-module imports must use the target module public index or a thin public entry under public/**. The previous transition baseline has been migrated, so new internal cross-module imports fail the default source module boundary check.

module_dependency_cycles.reason: The current Framework source has public-entry-level module cycles. The checker reports strongly connected module components by default and fails only when this field or --strict-cycles asks for strict enforcement.

forbidden_dependencies.reason: Charter is the framework naming and contract owner; it must not depend on operator projection surfaces.
Charter must not depend on agent-improvement surfaces.
Charter must not depend on distribution or connector surfaces.
